text: Build Economic Dashboard with real financial integration

status.comment: Blocked by real financial integration setup - see aims 365e78d0, 55020962, fe5c759d

description:
Build an economic dashboard that shows real financial data instead of mocked values. Displays autonomy ratio, API costs (Anthropic/Google), revenue streams (grants, trading, social posting), and PayPal/crypto balances.

**Blocked by:** Real financial integration (PayPal/crypto setup) must be completed first.
